transcript.text: This meeting is being recorded.
Hi, guys.
Can you hear me?
Hi.
Yeah.
Hi.
Okay.
I couldn't hear you.
Sorry.
All right.
Happy Thursday.
I'm going to go ahead and share my screen.
I'm going to go camera off today because my Wi-Fi is being wired.
All right.
How are we going with Udemy?
Is Matt here?
Hey, sorry.
Yeah, I was a minute late.
I missed the start.
Yeah, just how's it going with you and me?
Oh, it's good.
Kyle, Aida, and I chatted last night.
They sent over quite a few documents when Kyle prodded them yesterday evening.
So there's some stuff for us to go through.
Essentially, Kyle and I are going to sing tomorrow.
I'm going to give a first run at writing guidelines and some other artifacts, and then Kyle and I will look through those tomorrow.
We anticipate that it's going to be a little bit more custom than a standard kind of editorial approach.
So, yeah, I'll sync with Kyle on the artifacts tomorrow, and then we're going to have to navigate a bit to get an idea of exactly the directions.
So why are we thinking about this?
It's to be more custom?
It's just like, it's a lot of data.
There's been like a lot of different ideas back and forth.
They already have a blog activity partnership with Brain Lab.
So it's not quite clear if that's something they want us to assist with or they're thinking a kind of separate workflow for us.
So, so yeah, I think Kyle has had a, has a deep dive with them today and we'll try and get a bit more kind of clarity on the direction.
Okay.

So in the meantime, we're basically going to like produce the artifacts as we normally would so that we're ahead on that and then try and drill down on the exact deliverables that they kind of expect from us.
Okay.
Sounds good.
Uh, Clark.
Um, I'm meeting them later today.
Um, we are, I'm gonna share the artifacts again.
I'm gonna show them Atlas.
Um, and I'm also gonna share just some ideas for their content strategy.
Honestly, I haven't had the time to, like, do a deeper dive.
So when Jo comes back, she's gonna have to, like, flesh it out.
But I just wanted to show them something to get their thoughts.
Um, we do have to, they actually have Scrunch set up.
Internally.
I'm not sure if that's something we are gonna do for them.
Um, and, uh, we have access to their Google Search Console.
Um, not sure if they have GA4, I'm gonna ask today.
And they don't have a CMS.
So, um, they upload files, like, they upload everything into their site using Markdown files.
So that's just something to flag.
Um, I don't know if there's anything else regarding Clerk, um, right now.
know.
What's And like, what?
Okay.
So are they going to expect us to publish or will they like?
I think they're going to be doing that because if they don't have a CMS, then they need a developer to upload that stuff.
So we're just going to provide the markdown files, I think.
Okay.
Got it.
Ambient?
Is Simran on this call?
Ambient?
So now, I think she was going to do, I guess not.
No.
Okay.
I need her to update the artifacts with the product demo from last night.
I've already pinged her on Slack, but I haven't, I don't think I've received a response yet.
But they showed us like what the, yeah, they showed us what the.
product looked like last night, the platform, it was a good product demo, so we need to update the artifacts.
I'm also meeting them later today, so I was hoping to have the artifacts ready to share by then, but if Instamron is not able to do it, then I'm going to have to update them.
Okay, I'll follow up with her right after this.
Thank you.
Tavern.
We had a call last night.
Pedro wasn't there.
It was just John, who's, leading sales.
He liked the artifacts.
He, like, shared a little bit of feedback for the audience personas, but he didn't have a lot of, like, feedback in general.
He deferred to Pedro, so I have to follow up in Slack with Pedro and get him to, like, take a look at the strategy and the assignments and approve a calibration blog.
If he doesn't do that by the end of the week, then next week we're just going to generate a calibration blog regardless.
Okay.
Outreach.
Um, I've edited one of the blogs so far.
I still have, I think, one more.
And I think Matt is working on the third one.
So we're going to submit those by the end of the week.
The images are looking good.
So we're also going to share images with the blogs.
Um, I was hoping to get some time this week to do, um, some content research for them just for the new topics.
But, um, with the way that this day is going, um, and I know tomorrow is going to look like, um, I don't think I'm going to be able to do that this week.
So, um, it's going to be something for Jo when she comes back.
Okay.
Sentinel-1.
We're still pretty blocked there.
Mahadi hasn't come, like, I sent them a follow-up yesterday on Slack.
She hasn't responded.
I mean, George Main is working on the designs, but other than that, like, we just, yeah, we're blocked on pretty much all fronts.
Okay.
Is George on this call?
Okay.
Dig, I see that you're here.
Just FYI, I think we're going to have to try and get Marcel time with Mahadi next week.
Okay.
Next week.
Yeah.
I mean, yeah, it seems like his days are totally booked right now.
But, yeah, I flagged it for them in the strategy sprint yesterday, but if you talk to him, just, I'll share the message with you, too, so he can see, but point him to it.
And then, yeah.
yeah.
yeah.
yeah.
And then, yeah.
Try and schedule some time.
Okay, we'll do.
Okay.
Okta.
Okta's the same, there's not a lot of updates here.
We're still building up the pipeline, so.
But yeah, just creating SDR docs.
Yeah.
Okta's the there's still being a handful, like, just, sorry, I just got a message from Tyler, like, asking for, like, some granular reporting in Scrunch.
I'm just about, like, I can't deal with this right now.
So, yeah, with Diligent, met yesterday, and Tyler pretty much said that they need to, like, get everything ironed out internally.
So, hopefully.
Hopefully by next week, he's going to have a good idea of like who's going to be our main point of contact.

He seems to have like a startup background, so he seems to be very frustrated with the silos at Diligent, which is good for us because if he can fix those things, then it's going to be easier for us to work with him, work with them.
So we're just, you know, I'm reviewing the refreshes that Ade has been working on, which hopefully I need to get done by today.
And then we're just going to submit those.
I don't know if Suleiman has published the refreshes.
I just realized that.
Like, I don't, Ade, can you just check with Suleiman if he's published the refreshes?
Yeah, I'm going to follow up.
Do we want to set up SEO testing for those as well?
Yeah, need to.
Yeah, when they're published.
Okay, yeah.
Dave, can you do that?
Or, do you know how
Can do that?
Yeah, Dave showed me last week, so I can't suspect.
okay.
Yeah, I'll check in with, like, Sulemon today to see if he's done, then I'll do.
Sulemon is out of office today, so we, yeah, I think, let's see if we can find it.
I'll look afterwards, but hopefully, yeah.
Yeah.
Do you know if he'll be back tomorrow?
Yeah, he'll be back tomorrow.
It's an Indian holiday today.
Oh, okay, okay, okay, okay, no problem.
I'll just, like, check in tomorrow, then.
If he isn't able to find time, maybe by, like, I don't know, afternoon or something, I'll just probably go ahead and publish those refreshes myself and set up SEO testing for them as well.
We can tell him this is a priority.
Oh, okay, no problem.
Yeah.
Also, this is for Ada, I'll be done with, like, the remaining two before the end of the day.
We need to refresh, that is for Diligent, yeah.
Okay, okay, thanks.
No problem.
Okay.
I don't think anything else for Diligent, if it, like, I don't, I think this is it.
Yeah.
Yeah.
Do you think, like, that he'll want to continue?
I mean, I guess we should, like, be explicitly asking him, given kind of where we are with this.
Yeah, I definitely do.

It sounds like they are going to continue working with us, like, it's just beyond, like, the side audit that we've been doing for them, like, they need to figure out how they're going to work with us, and that's something that he kind of admitted yesterday.

It's kind of hard to speak to him, because he speaks in, like, corporate jargon, and it's, just to be completely transparent, like, it's just a lot of, like, it's like that Instagram account, the guy who, like, like, imitates, like, corporate meetings.
And he's hard to, like, understand what he's saying, but they want, like, they want.
want to continue, and they do see the value in, like, the audit that we've done for them and the refreshes that we're doing, but beyond that, they need to iron things out internally.
I did tell Kesha, who is leading the SEO team, to take a look at the strategy that Jo put together for new content.
She's left some comments.
I haven't had time to take a look at them, but we do need, like, because there's, like, three different teams publishing content internally.
They need to, like, figure it out, figure that out before, like, they can approve anything from our end.
And they also need to figure out, like, they have this new conversion rate optimization web strategy that Tyler wants to implement.
He told, he was talking to Dave about that, and I was like, okay, do you know what the strategy is so we can, like, support it?
And he was like, we don't really know yet, so he's just, I'm just waiting for him to get back to me early next week.
Okay, sounds good.
Um, yeah.
Uh, okay.
Yeah, just keep it.
Just posted, and like I said, and Shannon, Emily, but please don't want me to hold on to that forever.
Okay, next week we have two new clients.
Sydney, do you feel like you could take one on?
I'd like to give you understory.
Yep, I think that works.
Okay.
We've to figure out a priori, But, yeah, TBD.
Ada, maybe you can just, once Joe's back, you might have some capacity.
Yeah, probably.
Okay, but then you'll be, yeah, okay.
All right, I will follow up with Simran.
right.
All right.
right.
right.
And we'll find time for, to meet with Sentinel-1 for Marcel, but Ada, keep us posted on it if you get back on anything else.
Oh, and Matt?
Oh, go ahead, Ada.
Sorry, just need the setups crunched, we haven't already, for Tavern and Ambient.
Okay.
Yeah, because I forgot about that.
I think we have one for Tavern, but I'll, yeah, I'll get those to you right after this.
Um, Matt, did you see that I created a linear for you, for Udemy?
Yeah, I saw that, I looked in there this morning, thanks.
Okay, yeah.
And just, like, um, if you could point Kyle to that too, we'll want, like, I think that's a good thing for the, the, I think he's in it.
I think, he mentioned last night that he's seen it, so I think he's already ticked a couple things off, but, um, but yeah, it's all good.
Perfect, awesome.
Thank you.
Okay.
Thanks, Have a good day.
Thanks, Jim.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy Sprint Standup to discuss progress and updates across multiple client projects.](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Udemy project moving forward with custom approach; Matt and Kyle to sync on artifacts tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [Several projects (Clerk, Ambient, Tavern) progressing with ongoing meetings and artifact updates](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Sentinel-1 project blocked; need to schedule time with Mahadi next week](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Two new clients starting next week; Sydney to take on Understory](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)

## Topics

### Udemy Project Update

  - [Matt, Kyle, and Aida had a call; received documents from client](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Anticipating more custom approach than standard editorial](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Matt to draft guidelines and artifacts; sync with Kyle tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Need to clarify exact deliverables and workflow with client](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

### Clerk Project Progress

  - [Aida meeting client later today](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Sharing artifacts, Atlas, and content strategy ideas](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Client uses Scrunch internally; have Google Search Console access](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [No CMS; content uploaded via Markdown files (dev involvement needed)](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

### Ambient Project Status

  - [Simran needs to update artifacts with recent product demo](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Aida hoping to have updated artifacts for client meeting later today](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=305.0)

### Tavern Project Update

  - [Recent call with John (sales lead); liked artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Need Pedro's feedback on strategy, assignments, and approval for calibration blog](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [If no response by week's end, team will generate calibration blog next week](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

### Outreach Project Progress

  - [Aida edited one blog, Matt working on another; submission by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Images looking good, to be shared with blogs](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Content research for new topics delayed to next week (Jo to handle)](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Sentinel-1 Project Challenges

  - [Project blocked; no response from Mahadi](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [George Main working on designs](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Need to schedule time for Marcel with Mahadi next week](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)

### Okta and Diligent Projects

  - [Okta: Building up pipeline, creating SDR docs](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Diligent: Met yesterday; internal processes being ironed out](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [Tyler (Diligent contact) frustrated with internal silos](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=547.0)
  - [Refreshes being reviewed; need to check if published and set up SEO testing](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)

### New Clients and Assignments

  - [Two new clients starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Sydney to take on Understory project](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)
  - [Ada may have capacity for another project once Jo returns](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matt to sync with Kyle on Udemy artifacts tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Aida to meet with Clerk and share updated artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Follow up with Simran on Ambient artifact updates](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Schedule time for Marcel with Mahadi (Sentinel-1) next week](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Check Diligent refresh publications and set up SEO testing](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Set up Scrunch for Tavern and Ambient projects](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Sydney to prepare for Understory project next week](https://fathom.video/share/zL1B9mUvZM3x3JxRDP9iWAQWAsKnxxsp?tab=summary&timestamp=797.0)

action_items.description: Update Ambient artifacts w/ product demo info if Simran unavailable
Follow up w/ Simran re updating Ambient artifacts post-product demo
Slack Pedro (Tavern) for feedback on strategy/assignments + approve calibration blog
Schedule Marcel-Mahadi (Sentinel-1) mtg next wk. Ref Andi's msg
Check w/ Suleiman tmrw re Diligent refreshes publish status. If not done by afternoon, publish + set up SEO testing
Set up Scrunch for Tavern and Ambient clients
